title: 殿下がバザーにやってきた！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion and I are on the way back from a day
out when, at her insistence, we stop by a bazaar.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow! There are so many little stalls! They're just
like the ones we saw selling food at the festival!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinkin' the two of ya looked familiar!
How's it goin'?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ines! Tamamo! Are you enjoying the market as
well?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh, you betcha! This bazaar a big deal for us!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
We show up, do a little rummaging, and always
walk away with bunches and bunches of neat
stuff! And all on the cheap! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Is that so?! I'm getting more excited by the
second!

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
All units, enter alpha formation! We must ensure
that no harm comes to the entourage!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Boy, those bodyguards of yours are as slick as
ever. That said...

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Urghhh... Mommy, they're scary!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, my. It looks like the little ones are a little
flustered.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Captain, why don't we take our leave? At this
rate, we'll only end up bothering the other
attendees.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I don't wish to frighten the children enjoying the
bazaar. I'm quite satisfied with simply having seen
it from afar.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa whoa whoa whoa whoa, hold on a sec!
Instead of callin' it quits...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ahem! Why don't we act as your guards? ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! If I spot any suspicious-lookin' weirdos
lurkin' around, I'll cuff 'em 'n take 'em downtown.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
If the two of you are willing to act as escorts, then
we needn't worry. The rest of us will assume beta
formation and survey the situation from the
background.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
My gratitude to you all for your continued
kindness. Well then, shall we? ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All right, we gotta hit this stall first! It's me and
Ines's favorite!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
They have clothing, and toys, and—goodness, are
these accessories handmade?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Bazaars sell more than just second-hand stuff.
They have handcrafted items too.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? Then, I believe I'll purchase this one.
Pardon me, but are you the one who made this?

text_block_list.name: Bazaar Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
That's right...
Wait a sec... Are you Fine Motion?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
This item has utterly captivated me. You're a
wonderful craftsperson. ♪

text_block_list.name: Bazaar Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Oh, n-not at all! Y-you're too kind!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What the... From this angle, it looks kinda like
there's a halo hoverin' over Fine's head...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo, Ines! Thank you both so much for
making this wonderful experience possible.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Th-that bright smile! I'm blind!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion continues to enjoy the bazaar,
leisurely going from one stall to the next.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is it closing time already? It feels like it's only
been a moment.
choice_data_list: You sure had some great security.
You sure had some great security.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is it closing time already? It feels like it's only
been a moment.
choice_data_list: You sure had some great security.
You sure had some great security.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I did! I found some real treasures, thanks to
everyone's help. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, you went head-over-heels for that
T-shirt ya got at the end.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh, what did you buy? Show me! Show me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That's quite a shirt... It's got a gigantic kanji for
"noodles" on the front...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! I've never seen a T-shirt with a design
like this before, so I just couldn't help myself. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah. Now that's chic. I bet my grandma back home'd like it too!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I might hang it in my room to remember
today by. Hehe. Bazaars really are wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion looks overjoyed after spending a fun
day at the bazaar with her friends.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I sure did! In fact, I hope I can rely on them again
sometime!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We gotcha covered! Bargain huntin's serious
business, after all. Next time, we'll even let you in
on some trade secrets.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Maybe next time we could try shopping at
another market!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you both so much! With you two by my
side, I feel like I'm going to learn a great deal
about Japan's shopping culture and etiquette!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! Looks like I better get used to this majestic
glow!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ya can say that again...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's friends find themselves dazzled by
the sheer majesty she radiates from time to time.
